description: A pair of open-toed, maroon flats, has slip-on stylingSynthetic upper, has a plastic toe separator, has criss-crossing forefoot and midfoot straps, knotted in the centreSoft, lightly padded footbed with branding on the heelTextured outsole with an upraised heel, has grooves all overWarranty: 30 days from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects only
